title: Frequency Cap (3 impressions/user)
setup: Creates a dominant-CPM campaign and sends 6 sequential requests from the SAME user_id (passed as the VAST ifa parameter).
expected_standard_behaviour: After 3 impressions the same user is no longer served the campaign (requests 4-6 get no fill).
expected_verdict_vs_voise_adserver: GAP — decide_vast_ad performs no per-user frequency capping, so the same user is served on every request.
